title: 视觉GPT时刻来了！DeepMind用Vision Banana证明「生成即理解」_网易订阅
summary: 视觉GPT时刻来了！DeepMind用Vision Banana证明「生成即理解」_网易订阅 快速导航 新闻 体育 娱乐 财经 汽车 科技 时尚 手机 / 数码 房产 / 家居 教育 安全退出 邮箱 视觉GPT时刻来了！DeepMind用Vision Banana证明「生成即理解」 2026-04-24 11:36:18 来源:机器之心Pro北京举报 0 分享至 用微信扫码二维码 分享至好友和朋友圈 编辑｜Panda、泽南 前两天，OpenAI 的 ChatGPT Im
content: 视觉GPT时刻来了！DeepMind用Vision [...] 证明「生成即理解」 [...] 前两天，OpenAI 的 ChatGPT Images 2.0 惊艳了世界，其在实测中的表现整体上已经超过了之前 SOTA 的 Nano Banaba Pro。 [...] 就在人们还在惊叹于 AI 图像生成的卓越能力时，谷歌 DeepMind 却放出了一篇重量级论文《Image Generators are Generalist Vision Learners》，其中系统性地证明了之前许多人已经有过的直觉：图像生成器就是强大的通用视觉学习器 [...] /abs/2604.20329v1 [...] .github.io/ [...] Google DeepMind 的研究发现，类似于 LLM 的生成式预训练会让模型涌现出语言理解和推理能力，图像生成训练能使模型学习到强大且通用的视觉表征，从而在各种视觉任务中实现 SOTA 的性能。 [...] 基于这一发现，他们还基于 Nano Banana Pro 构建了一个通用模型Vision Banana，并取得了相当亮眼的表现，媲美甚至超越了零样本领域专家模型，比如用于分割任务的 Segment Anything Model 3、用于深度估计的 Depth Anything 系列。 [...] 这项研究意义重大，其表明图像生成可以作为视觉任务的统一通用接口。DeepMind 也在论文中表示：「我们可能正见证计算机视觉领域的重大范式转变，其中生成式视觉预训练在构建同时支持生成和理解的基础视觉模型中扮演核心角色。」 [...] 0. [...] 2，领跑 [...] 方法，进一步缩小了与 [...] Vision Banana 在此任务上表现尤为出色：在 RefCOCOg 数据集（UMD 验证集）上取得 cIoU 0.738，在 ReasonSeg 验证集上取得 gIoU 0.793，均超越 SAM 3 Agent（0.734 / 0.770）。更令人惊喜的是，当与 Gemini 2.5 Pro 结合使用时，Vision Banana 在 ReasonSeg 上甚至能超越部分在训练集上经过完整训练的非零样本方法。研究者观察到，Vision Banana 继承自生成式预训练的多模态智能，使其能更有效地推理「分割什么」，这正是判别式模型难以企及的优势。 [...] 在六大公开基准上，Vision Banana 的平均 δ_1 精度达到 0.882，在与 Depth Anything V3 直接可比的四个数据集（NYU、ETH3D、DIODE-indoor、KITTI）上平均 δ_1 为 0.929，超过 Depth Anything V3 的 0.918。与 UniK3D 相比领先近 6 个百分点，绝对相对误差（AbsRel）比 MoGe-2 低约 。 [...] 研究团队在 GenAI-Bench（文字生成图像）和 ImgEdit（图像编辑）两个基准上进行了人类偏好评估，Vision Banana 对 Nano Banana Pro 的胜率分别为 53.和 47.（见图 1）。

title: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with accurate text and reasoning
summary: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with accurate text and reasoning OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with accurate text and reasoning April 22, 2026 April 22, 2026 59 OpenAI released ChatGPT Images 2.0 on Tuesday, a novel image generation model that integrates reasoning capabilities to search
content: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with accurate text and reasoning [...] OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with accurate text and reasoning [...] OpenAI released ChatGPT Images 2.0 on Tuesday, a novel image generation model that integrates reasoning capabilities to search the web and verify outputs, marking a significant shift from earlier diffusion-based systems that struggled with text rendering. [...] The model generates images with accurate text in multiple languages, including non-Latin scripts like Japanese, Korean, Hindi and Bengali, addressing a longstanding weakness in AI image generation where spelling and character accuracy were frequently flawed. [...] Unlike previous versions, Images 2.0 can produce multiple images from a single prompt, such as an entire study booklet or multi-paneled comic strip, and supports aspect ratios ranging from 3:1 wide to 1:3 tall, with resolutions up to 2K. [...] OpenAI says the model’s knowledge cutoff is December 2025, which may limit its accuracy for prompts involving very recent events, though it enables more granular and context-aware outputs, such as weather-informed infographics with precise local landmarks. [...] The company declined to disclose the underlying architecture of Images 2.0, but emphasized its “thinking capabilities,” which allow it to follow complex instructions, preserve fine-grained details like UI elements and iconography, and double-check creations for consistency. [...] All ChatGPT and Codex users globally can access Images 2.0, with a more powerful version available to paying subscribers, reflecting OpenAI’s tiered access strategy for its multimodal tools. [...] By enabling accurate text rendering and scene coherence, Images 2.0 aims to serve use cases where precision matters, such as marketing assets, game prototyping, and storyboarding, where visual and linguistic fidelity are essential. [...] While the model represents a step forward in reducing the gap between AI-generated and human-made imagery, OpenAI acknowledges that challenges remain in achieving perfect prompt adherence, particularly in multi-step creative tasks. [...] Images 2.0 uses reasoning capabilities to better handle dense text and non-Latin scripts, significantly reducing malformed characters and spelling errors that plagued earlier models like DALL-E 3, which often produced invented or garbled words in image outputs. [...] The model’s knowledge is current only up to December 2025, so it may not accurately depict events or developments after that date, though it can search the web for information within its training cutoff to improve contextual relevance.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 with Outstanding Capabilities
summary: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 with Outstanding Capabilities Loading... - International - Science & Technology OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 with Outstanding Capabilities - By Web Desk - - - Apr 25, 2026 OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5, its latest large language model, which boasts impressive features like en
content: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 with Outstanding Capabilities Loading... - International - Science & Technology OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 with Outstanding Capabilities - By Web Desk - - - Apr 25, 2026 OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5, its latest large language model, which boasts impressive features like enhanced general knowledge, improved emotional intelligence, and multimodal input capabilities. This model is available to users subscribed to the ChatGPT Plus and Pro plans across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Key Features: Enhanced General Knowledge: GPT-5.5 offers improved understanding and generation of text, making it ideal for tasks requiring broad knowledge. Improved Emotional Intelligence: The model is designed for more natural conversations, excelling in tasks like writing help, coaching, and nuanced communication. Multimodal Input: GPT-5.5 supports text and image inputs, making it versatile for various applications. Pricing and Availability: GPT-5.5 is priced at $75 per million input tokens and $150 per million output tokens. Available to ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, with access also provided through the OpenAI API and Developer Playground until July 14, 2025.

title: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Web Search and Advanced AI 'Thinking' for Precision Visuals
summary: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Web Search and Advanced AI 'Thinking' for Precision Visuals OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Web Search and Advanced AI 'Thinking' for Precision Visuals New GPT Image 2 model enables multi-image generation, improved accuracy and multilingual text
content: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Web Search and Advanced AI 'Thinking' for Precision Visuals [...] OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Web Search and Advanced AI 'Thinking' for Precision Visuals [...] New GPT Image 2 model enables multi-image generation, improved accuracy and multilingual text rendering for creators and businesses [...] OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0 with thinking AI, web search and multi-image output, delivering sharper, consistent, and multilingual visuals. OpenAI [...] OpenAI has unveiled a major upgrade to its image generation capabilities with the launch of ChatGPT Images 2.0, a new model designed to deliver more precise and production-ready visuals. [...] The announcement, shared on social media, describes the system as a state-of-the-art tool capable of handling complex visual tasks with sharper editing, richer layouts and enhanced reasoning abilities. [...] OpenAI's new model, powered by GPT Image 2, introduces what the company calls "thinking capabilities," enabling it to interpret prompts better, analyse structure and even pull in real-time information from the web. [...] A key feature of Images 2.0 is its ability to produce up to eight distinct images from a single prompt when thinking mode is enabled. [...] The upgrade also significantly improves image quality. Users can now generate visuals in resolutions up to 2K, with support for multiple aspect ratios. [...] Another major advancement lies in multilingual text rendering within images. The system now supports accurate text generation across several languages, including Hindi, Bengali, Japanese, Korean and Chinese, addressing a longstanding limitation in AI image tools. [...] OpenAI stated that when thinking or pro modes are selected, the model can verify its own outputs and handle more complex creative tasks with greater reliability. These advanced features are currently available to ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business and Enterprise subscribers. [...] The rollout of ChatGPT Images 2.0 is underway for all ChatGPT and Codex users, marking another step in OpenAI's ongoing efforts to refine AI-driven creative tools amid intensifying competition in the space. [...] Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0A state-of-the-art image model that can take on complex visual tasks and produce precise, immediately usable visuals, with sharper editing, richer layouts, and thinking-level intelligence.Video made with ChatGPT Images pic.twitter.com/3aWfXakrcR

title: Google DeepMind launches Deep Research Max autonomous AI research agent
summary: Google DeepMind launches Deep Research Max autonomous AI research agent | ETIH EdTech News — EdTech Innovation Hub Google's new AI agent will run 160 searches while you sleep and hand you the report by morning 22 Apr New Gemini 3.1 Pro-powered agents hit public preview with MCP support, na
content: Google DeepMind launches Deep Research Max autonomous AI research agent | ETIH EdTech News — EdTech Innovation Hub [...] New Gemini 3.1 Pro-powered agents hit public preview with MCP support, native charts and multimodal inputs, as Google positions Deep Research as an enterprise workflow engine for finance and life sciences. [...] Google DeepMind has launched Gemini 3.1 Pro-powered Deep Research and Deep Research Max agents in public preview via the Gemini API. [...] Google DeepMind has launched two new autonomous research agents, Deep Research and Deep Research Max, in public preview via the Gemini API. Built on Gemini 3.1 Pro, the agents search the open web, user file uploads and connected data sources through Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, generate charts and infographics natively, and consult over 100 sources in a single task. [...] Google is positioning the release as a move beyond summarization into an enterprise workflow layer for finance, life sciences and market research, with named financial data partners already building MCP integrations. [...] The standard Deep Research agent replaces the December preview release and is optimized for speed and lower cost, aimed at interactive user-facing products. Deep Research Max is the heavier option, designed for asynchronous background workflows such as overnight due diligence reports, and uses extended test-time compute to iteratively search and refine its output. [...] Max runs around 160 search queries per task, according to Philipp Schmid, AI Developer Experience at Google DeepMind, who announced the update on LinkedIn. The two new models are "deep-research-preview-04-2026" and "deep-research-max-preview-04-2026". Schmid reported benchmark scores of 93.3 percent on DeepSearchQA for web research and 85.9 percent on BrowseComp for hard-fact retrieval. [...] Chief Strategist [...] set out the framing [...] "Two speeds with two purposes. The regular Deep Research is the quick approach: It [...] s fast, cheap and still gets you a solid answer. Max is the patient AI who works through the night [...] you wake up to something exhaustive," he posted [...] Hoyne said [...] agents pull in user files as well as Google data, generate charts and infographics in-line, and show users the plan before execution so they can "tweak, you redirect, you say 'focus here!', etc." [...] Google's new AI agent will run 160 searches while you sleep and hand you the report by morning

title: DeepSeek V4 Pro and Flash Launch With 1M Context and Lower AI Costs
summary: DeepSeek V4 Pro and Flash Launch With 1M Context and Lower AI Costs - OnMSFT DeepSeek has launched its latest AI models, V4 Pro and V4 Flash, bringing a major upgrade in context length and cost efficiency while pushing closer to top closed-source systems. The company says both models support up to
content: DeepSeek V4 Pro and Flash Launch With 1M Context and Lower AI Costs - OnMSFT DeepSeek has launched its latest AI models, V4 Pro and V4 Flash, bringing a major upgrade in context length and cost efficiency while pushing closer to top closed-source systems. The company says both models support up to one million tokens, which allows them to handle long conversations, large codebases, and detailed documents with better consistency. This puts them in direct comparison with models like GPT-5.5 that also reach similar context limits. Bigger models with faster performance 🚀 DeepSeek-V4 Preview is officially live & open-sourced! Welcome to the era of cost-effective 1M context length.🔹 DeepSeek-V4-Pro: 1.6T total / 49B active params. Performance rivaling the world's top closed-source models.🔹 DeepSeek-V4-Flash: 284B total / 13B active params.… pic.twitter.com/n1AgwMIymu > — DeepSeek (@deepseek_ai) April 24, 2026 DeepSeek designed V4 Pro as its flagship model with 1.6 trillion parameters and improved reasoning abilities, while V4 Flash focuses on speed and efficiency with smaller size but similar performance on simpler tasks. Both models use a mixture-of-experts approach, which activates only a portion of parameters during tasks to reduce costs and improve response time. The company says these improvements help close the gap with leading AI systems, although it still trails slightly in world knowledge compared to top models like Gemini 3.1 Pro. DeepSeek has priced both models aggressively, with V4 Flash starting at $0.14 per million input tokens and V4 Pro offering competitive rates against major AI providers. This makes them some of the most affordable large models available right now. However, the launch comes with ongoing scrutiny, as US agencies have already restricted DeepSeek over security concerns, and questions around data privacy and model training practices continue to follow the company.
